## How was it tested?

- [ ] Server: `ruff check`, `mypy --strict`, `pytest tests/unit tests/integration`
- [ ] Web: `pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build`
- [ ] If API routes/schemas changed: `pnpm regen-api-types` re-run and `llms.txt` updated
